reviews.comment:
Para salir o al ingresar al país, está muy bien ubicado para la carga de combustibles. Además, servicio de wi-fi, baños limpios, para desayunar, agua para mate y compras para continuar viaje.

(Translated by Google)
Whether you're leaving or entering the country, it's very well located for fueling up. It also offers Wi-Fi, clean restrooms, a place to have breakfast, water for mate, and shopping for your next trip.
